subject: Create Energidrikke EDA script from CSD template
description: Copy thesis/data/preprocessing/nielsen/CSD/pre_csd_1.5_eda.py to thesis/data/preprocessing/nielsen/Energidrikke/pre_energidrikke_1.5_eda.py. Change CATEGORY variable from 'CSD' to 'Energidrikke' (and any csd_ prefixed filenames/paths). Verify the script loads from the correct step_1 parquet (Energidrikke/pipeline_step_outputs/step_1_log.json confirms step 1 ran). Run the script to generate energidrikke_eda_findings.json in Energidrikke/pipeline_step_outputs/. Confirm JSON findings file is created and contains the key parameters: MIN_PERIODS, LAGS, ROLLING_WINDOWS, HOLIDAY_MONTHS, TRAIN_END, VAL_END.
